_notes: H-GRPO Method D: counterfactual-rollout decomposer. For each (i, t) we sample N=2 alt actions from the policy at state_t, complete a 3-turn greedy rollout, and emit r_t = R - mean(R_alt). With n_turns_per_traj=2 we randomly subsample 2 turns per trajectory to bound the per-group cost (≈ K*2*N = 32 alt rollouts/group instead of K*T_avg*N ≈ 80). lambda_consistency=0 because the CF deltas don't satisfy the §3.2 sum-to-R invariant — the C3 consistency loss would just push α toward zero. skip_if_zero_R=true halves wall-clock on early training when most trajectories fail.
